---
title: "Lecture 12"
subtitle: ENVX2001 Applied Statistical Methods
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMM YYYY"
format: html
---

**Lecture 12 -- Multidimensional scaling**

## Part A

{{< pdf Lecture-12a.pdf width="100%" height="600" button="Download PDF" >}}

## Part B

{{< pdf Lecture-12b.pdf width="100%" height="600" button="Download PDF" >}}
